modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Outlook shows different information on laptop and desktop.

full_description_text: User has problem with Outlook. Laptop and desktop do not sync correctly. Found message about Synchronization Log in deleted items. This is causing confusion and issues with email access.
short_description: Outlook shows different information on laptop and desktop.
description: User has problem with Outlook. Laptop and desktop do not sync correctly. Found message about Synchronization Log in deleted items. This is causing confusion and issues with email access.
